description_long: This is a rustic gate set within a stone wall, featuring a wooden arched frame and a central wooden door. The door has a small, vertically oriented window or peephole, adding both functionality and visual interest. The stone wall sections on either side of the gate are constructed from irregular, rough-hewn stones, giving the structure a robust and weathered appearance. The wooden arch and door are made from planks with visible grain and a slightly aged finish, contrasting with the stone. The top of the wall is capped with a wooden beam, providing a cohesive transition between the stone and wood elements. The overall design suggests a traditional or historical urban setting, such as a garden entrance or courtyard access.
description: A rustic wooden gate set in a rough stone wall, featuring an arched wooden frame and a small window in the door. The structure combines weathered wood and irregular stone for a traditional, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden arched frame, central door with a small window, and the stone wall sections on either side.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the gate and wall, with the arch and door barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden door and arch, with the stone wall appearing darker and more textured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow edge of the structure.
